changes.reason: Edgren: strenuo = strenuously (implying strenuous); 'strenua lotta' is better rendered 'strenuous struggle' than 'fierce struggle'
changes.context_sentence: deas and men of the new order had continued their strenuous struggle for the conquest of the future, and great events

changes.reason: Edgren: gretto = parsimonious (miserly, niggardly); 'niggardly' is the more period-appropriate English equivalent
changes.context_sentence: he French; and in either case, what results?... a niggardly aggrandizement of his Piedmont; a small additional source of rev
